item.title: PGNWTLOI1D: Thomas Niblock reposteó Podge McG @PGNWTLOI1D · 3h On the eve of the start of the hurling, I would highly recommend list
item.description:
Thomas Niblock reposteó Podge McG @PGNWTLOI1D · 3h On the eve of the start of the hurling, I would highly recommend listening to Conor Whelan's chat with @thomasniblock
A reminder that while we might be obsessed with the game, life is a lot bigger than hurling & people have real issues to deal with #gaa open.spotify.com Conor Whelan. Changing direction in life, no glass ceiling in Galway. The GAA Social · Episode 1 1 1 513

item.title: lorcan125: Thomas Niblock reposteó stephen mc kerr @lorcan125 · 15 abr. @thomasniblock just listened to the Connor Whelan podcast,
item.description: Thomas Niblock reposteó stephen mc kerr @lorcan125 · 15 abr. @thomasniblock just listened to the Connor Whelan podcast, what a very clever young man, probably one of the best podcasts you have ever done, the whole mental health awareness is something that needs to get out there, great podcast 1 1 1 387

The GAA @officialgaa · 29min Ahead of @OfficialWexGAA 's Leinster SHC championship opener against @KildareGAA on Saturday, Lee Chin reflects on his career to date, his determination to be the best hurler he can be, and his hopes for the future. #GAABelong De gaa.ie 3 1 mil

The GAA @officialgaa · 39min The @gaaleinster SHC commences tomorrow with @KilkennyCLG star Eoin Cody positive and optimistic about enjoying another productive campaign #GAA
https:// soundcloud.com/officialgaa/ga a-ie-interview-kilkenny-1 … 1 mil

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 1h Eimear McGrath says the The Cork-Tipperary double header at FBD Semple Stadium on Sunday will
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 1h Eimear McGrath says the The Cork-Tipperary double header at FBD Semple Stadium on Sunday will be extra-special for her family with members involved in both the camogie and hurling matches. #GAABelong De gaa.ie 1 1 mil

The GAA @officialgaa · 1h The @gaaleinster Hurling Championship is wide open
@DubGAAOfficial hurler Cian O'Sullivan says they've had a taste of the big days and want more 7 2 mil
